name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, missed renewals cause compliance issues. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking policy renewals and expirations
